parsed_review.summary: CP00-909 is a clean, internally consistent descriptor-only closeout pack bridging the final RP30 P02 AttendanceWorkflow tail row (RP30.P02.M02.S13) into 9 RecruitmentWorkflow HRX slice rows (RP30.P02.M03.S01-S09), risk class A, 10 units. Read-only verification confirms the pack-level claim (production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, descriptor_only) is fully supported: (1) registry.js descriptor and createHrxDomainRows set every runtime/write/decision/offer/real-data flag false, with HRX_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION and an authority boundary that keeps Claude non-final-approver and defers runtime opening + human approval to CP00-910; (2) validators.js rejects any attendance/recruitment runtime, decision/record writes, candidate payloads, offer creation, real HR data, credentials, or secrets, and enforces section/row/title counts; (3) model.test.js covers binding, coverage distribution (1 AttendanceWorkflow + 9 RecruitmentWorkflow), descriptor boundaries, and on-disk contract currency; (4) contracts/hrx-people-contract.json reflects CP00-909 as current/latest with the correct descriptor name, and a targeted grep found no boundary flag set to true; (5) plan, next-pack-queue (live_latest=CP00-908, next=CP00-909), manifest plan_binding_snapshot, validation script, and README all agree with no drift. No fs/child_process/network/process.env usage exists in packages/hrx/src, and the Hermes evidence packet is deterministic review/gate metadata only (emits_runtime_receipt=false), not embedded product runtime. Review hardening checks pass: auth preflight succeeded (valid JSON, 1446-byte stdout, exit 0), the review request/schema are well-formed, and no auth failure, empty stdout, malformed/fenced JSON, or tool-call-shaped evidence is present. The pack does not assert runtime or enterprise-trust readiness, so the expected human/enterprise-trust approval boundary lies outside this receipt and does not set blocks_goal_closeout. Constraint note (verification provenance): under the read-only mandate I did not re-execute the validation ladder; command-evidence records the initial syntax/test/rp30/hrx commands at exit 0 and flags a required full re-run (npm test, npm run validate, closeout-pack(-plan):validate, weighted/fullplan/spec/goal/rp00 validators, git diff --check) before commit. Pending PENDING placeholders in construction-inspection.json, adjudication.md, and claude-review-result.json are expected pre-closeout state to be finalized by this review and downstream adjudication, not defects. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
